SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class NetworkNewtonSolver

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.NetworkNewtonSolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class NetworkNewtonSolver extends Object implements Serializable
Global pressure-flow solver for an integrated production network.

This solver mirrors the architecture of commercial network tools (Petex GAP, Schlumberger Pipesim): a set of nodes are connected by branches (wells, flowlines, chokes). Some node pressures are fixed boundary conditions (reservoir datum, separator/export header); the remaining free node pressures are found by enforcing volumetric mass balance at every free node.

The unknowns are the free-node pressures. For each free node the residual is

R = Q_external + Σ(branch flows in) - Σ(branch flows out)

which must be zero at convergence. The system is solved with a damped global Newton-Raphson iteration using a numerical (finite-difference) Jacobian and a self-contained Gaussian elimination with partial pivoting. If Newton stalls, a successive-substitution fallback is used. Branch flow evaluations are cheap because each branch hides its physics behind a surrogate (deliverability curve, quadratic pressure drop), so no thermodynamic flash runs inside the Jacobian loop.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

      public void setMaxIterations(int maxIterations)
      Sets the maximum number of iterations.
      Parameters:
      maxIterations - iteration limit

    • setTolerance

      public void setTolerance(double tolerance)
      Sets the mass-balance residual tolerance.
      Parameters:
      tolerance - residual tolerance in Sm3/day

    • setMinPressure

      public void setMinPressure(double minPressureBara)
      Sets the minimum allowed pressure for free nodes.
      Parameters:
      minPressureBara - lower pressure bound in bara

      public NetworkNode getNode(String name)
      Returns a node by name.
      Parameters:
      name - node name
      Returns:
      the node, or null if not present

      private NetworkNewtonSolver.NetworkSolutionResult successiveSubstitution(List<NetworkNode> free, double[] startPressures)
      Successive-substitution fallback solver.
      Parameters:
      free - free nodes
      startPressures - starting pressures in bara
      Returns:
      a result if it converges, otherwise null

    • applyPressures

      private void applyPressures(List<NetworkNode> free, double[] p)
      Applies a pressure vector to the free nodes.
      Parameters:
      free - free nodes
      p - pressures in bara

      private double[] residuals(List<NetworkNode> free)
      Computes the residual vector over the free nodes.
      Parameters:
      free - free nodes
      Returns:
      residuals in Sm3/day

    • nodeResidual

      private double nodeResidual(NetworkNode node)
      Computes the volumetric balance residual at a node.
      Parameters:
      node - the node
      Returns:
      residual in Sm3/day (inflow - outflow + external)

    • jacobian

      private double[][] jacobian(List<NetworkNode> free, double[] p, double[] r)
      Builds the finite-difference Jacobian of the residuals with respect to free-node pressures.
      Parameters:
      free - free nodes
      p - current pressures in bara
      r - residuals at the current pressures
      Returns:
      the Jacobian matrix

    • gaussianSolve

      private double[] gaussianSolve(double[][] a, double[] b)
      Solves a dense linear system A x = b by Gaussian elimination with partial pivoting.
      Parameters:
      a - coefficient matrix (modified in place)
      b - right-hand side (modified in place)
      Returns:
      the solution vector, or null if the matrix is singular

    • negate

      private double[] negate(double[] v)
      Negates a vector.
      Parameters:
      v - input vector
      Returns:
      the negated vector

      private double maxAbs(double[] v)
      Returns the maximum absolute value of a vector.
      Parameters:
      v - input vector
      Returns:
      infinity norm

    • buildResult

      private NetworkNewtonSolver.NetworkSolutionResult buildResult(boolean converged, int iterations, double maxResidual, String method)
      Builds a solution result snapshot from the current node pressures and branch flows.
      Parameters:
      converged - whether the solve converged
      iterations - number of iterations
      maxResidual - final maximum residual in Sm3/day
      method - solver method name
      Returns:
      the solution result
